name: LeAnn Rimes
abstract: Margaret LeAnn Rimes Cibrian (née Rimes, born August 28, 1982) is an American singer, songwriter and actress. She originally rose to success as a country music artist at the age of 13 and has since crossed over into pop, contemporary Christian, and other musical genres.

concerts.label: The New York Pops 42nd Birthday Gala
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral
about_quotes.evidence: Vince Gill and then that new young girl, Leann Rimes? She’s a fabulous singer, got a great voice and she’s just true blue, you know right in there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998
